to update data in the Order table

to match data in the Customer table to data in the Order table

questions.explanation: Stream processing handles data continuously and is used when low latency or near real-time results are needed.

to provide answers to complex queries that rely on data from multiple sources
to provide transformation services between source and target data stores

pairs.explanation: Scheduled or grouped loads are batch workloads. Continuous high-rate real-time ingestion is streaming.

questions.explanation: Batch processing processes collected data later, so latency is usually higher than streaming.
questions.question: What is a characteristic of batch processing?
options: The data ingested during batch processing must be processed as soon as the data is received.
There is a noticeable time delay between ingesting data and obtaining the data processing results.
Large datasets must be split into batches of less than 1 GB before the data can be processed.
Batch processing can only process data that is structured.
questions.correctAnswer: There is a noticeable time delay between ingesting data and obtaining the data processing results.

questions.question: Batch workloads ____.
options: always process data in memory, row-by-row
collect and process data at most once a day
process data as new data is received in near real-time
collect data and then process the data when a condition is met

options: From the Power BI service, publish the report to a workspace that uses role-based access control (RBAC).
Save the report data to Log Analytics and instruct the authorized users to query the data from there.
Export the report to a PDF file and email the file to the authorized users.
Save the PBIX file to Microsoft OneDrive and email the OneDrive link for the file to the authorized users.
questions.correctAnswer: From the Power BI service, publish the report to a workspace that uses role-based access control (RBAC).

a lack of dependencies between tables
data is queried and manipulated by using a variant of the SQL language

contains entities that have the same attributes
is commonly stored by using the schema-on-read approach
is NOT organized in a predefined manner
questions.correctAnswer: contains entities that have the same attributes

questions.explanation: Avro stores row-oriented records with schema information, commonly represented in JSON, and binary-encoded data.
questions.question: ____ is a row-based file format where each record contains a JSON header and binary data.
